texto: Where's your church?""We're standing in it.""But this is a bookstore and it's a Friday.""Yes, but you might also choose to see it as a cathedral of the human spirit-a storehouse consecrated to the full spectrum of human experience. Just about every idea we've ever had is in here somewhere. A place containing great thinking is a sacred space.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Forrest Church que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “Where's your church?""We're standing in it.""But this is a bookstore and it's a Friday.""Yes, but…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, book, book-lover, com foco em book-lover e books.
